HNMW.name: The Opening Weekender
HNMW.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you show up for the big new releases and rate them like everyone else does — mostly. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, which you rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. Favorites like {{topMovies}} show a taste that spreads wide across {{topGenre}} and beyond, rather than digging into one lane.

HNMF.name: The Franchise Regular
HNMF.tagline: You know exactly what you're getting, and that's the point.
HNMF.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you keep coming back to {{topGenre}} — new releases, big names, no surprises needed. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} round out a taste that isn't looking for range, it's looking for more of what already works.

HNUW.name: The Trend Scout
HNUW.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you chase what's new without sticking to one lane — but you skip whatever's topping the charts. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} suggest you'd rather find the next thing than watch the thing everyone's already found.

HNUF.name: The Deep Cut Hunter
HNUF.tagline: If it's trending, you've probably already moved on.
HNUF.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you stay locked on {{topGenre}} — but always the newest, least-talked-about entries in it. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} read less like a watchlist and more like a specialist's beat.

HOMW.name: The Canon Completist
HOMW.tagline: You're building the whole library, not just a shelf.
HOMW.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you work through decades of acclaimed, widely-loved films across every genre. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} look like homework nobody assigned you — you just wanted to have actually seen it.

HOMF.name: The Golden Age Devotee
HOMF.tagline: They don't make them like they used to, and you'd know.
HOMF.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you keep circling back to {{topGenre}} from decades past — the acknowledged classics, not the deep cuts. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} suggest a taste that was formed by a specific era and never really left it.

HOUW.name: The Archive Digger
HOUW.tagline: Every era has its forgotten gems, and you've found most of them.
HOUW.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you range wide across genres and decades, consistently landing on titles nobody else remembers. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} look like the output of someone who treats old catalogs as a place to explore, not a chore.

HOUF.name: The Cult Classicist
HOUF.tagline: Your favorites have a very specific, very small fanbase — and you're in it.
HOUF.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you're deep into older {{topGenre}} that never broke through, and you're not looking for it to now. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} suggest a taste built around a lane most people never even knew existed.

LNMW.name: The Weekend Sampler
LNMW.tagline: You show up for the big ones, then move on with your life.
LNMW.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you keep it light — recent, well-liked, and spread across whatever's on. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} aren't a project, just a reasonable way to spend a Friday.

LNMF.name: The Casual Fan
LNMF.tagline: You've got one lane, and you're happy in it.
LNMF.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you check in on {{topGenre}} when something new shows up, without going looking for anything else. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} suggest a taste that's settled, not indifferent.

LNUW.name: The Selective Scout
LNUW.tagline: You don't watch much, but what you watch, nobody else has heard of.
LNUW.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you're choosy — recent, under-the-radar, and spread across genres rather than locked into one. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} look like the result of real curation, not volume.

LNUF.name: The Niche Specialist
LNUF.tagline: Small pool, but you know it better than anyone.
LNUF.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you stay narrowly focused on newer {{topGenre}} that most people have never encountered. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} suggest you'd rather go deep on one specific thing than wide on everything.

LOMW.name: The Classic Sampler
LOMW.tagline: You dip into the canon when the mood strikes.
LOMW.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you pick up well-regarded older films here and there, without committing to any one genre. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} read like an occasional visitor to film history, not a resident.

LOMF.name: The Comfort Rewatcher
LOMF.tagline: You know what you love, and you don't need anything new.
LOMF.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you return to the same well-loved corner of {{topGenre}} from years past. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} aren't about discovery — they're about a taste you settled into a long time ago.

LOUW.name: The Quiet Collector
LOUW.tagline: You've got a handful of favorites nobody else has stumbled onto.
LOUW.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you rarely watch, but when you do, it's an overlooked older title from wherever the genre takes you. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd. {{topMovies}} suggest a small, deliberately-built taste rather than a wide net.

LOUF.name: The Cult Archivist
LOUF.tagline: You found it before it was cool.
LOUF.body: Across {{ratedCount}} movies, you keep circling back to older, under-the-radar titles nobody's talking about. Your signature pick was {{signatureMovie}}, rated {{signatureDirection}} the crowd — a tell that reputation means little to you. {{topMovies}} anchor a taste that's narrowed hard on {{topGenre}}.
